svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="前端分层依赖方向" id="fe-layers"> <mxGraphModel dx="-454" dy="-187" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="860" pageHeight="640" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="GRP" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=6;" value="前端分层：只许上层依赖下层，叶子节点（api / utils / constants）不许反向依赖业务层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="580" width="800" x="30" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L1" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;fontStyle=2;" value="业务层（上层）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="120" x="60" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="P" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="pages / views
业务页面" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="160" x="60" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L2" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;fontStyle=2;" value="复用层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="120" x="60" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="C" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="components
组件" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="140" x="60" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="S" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="stores
状态" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="140" x="230" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="CO" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="composables
组合式逻辑" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="150" x="400" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L3" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;fontStyle=2;" value="接口层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="120" x="60" y="370" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="A" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="api
接口层（叶子）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="140" x="60" y="400" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="D" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="domain
领域模型" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="140" x="230" y="400" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L4" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;fontStyle=2;" value="叶子层（最底层，不可反向依赖）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="240" x="60" y="510" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="U" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="utils
工具" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="60" y="540" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="K" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="constants
常量" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="230" y="540" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="BAD_LBL" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontColor=#dc2626;fontSize=11;" value="禁止：叶子反向依赖上层
（dep-cruiser 的 api-is-leaf / utils-is-leaf 规则拦截）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="250" x="560" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="BAD1" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontColor=#dc2626;fontSize=11;" value="❌ api → pages" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="160" x="560" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="BAD2" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontColor=#dc2626;fontSize=11;" value="❌ utils → 任何业务层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="200" x="560" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="BAD3" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontColor=#dc2626;fontSize=11;" value="❌ 循环依赖（no-circular）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="220" x="560" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E_PC" edge="1" parent="1" source="P" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;" target="C"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E_PS" edge="1" parent="1" source="P" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;" target="S"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E_PCO" edge="1" parent="1" source="P" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;" target="CO"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E_CCO" edge="1" parent="1" source="C" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#94a3b8;" target="CO"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E_SCO" edge="1" parent="1" source="S" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#94a3b8;" target="CO"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E_COA" edge="1" parent="1" source="CO" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;" target="A"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E_COD" edge="1" parent="1" source="CO" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;" target="D"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E_AU" edge="1" parent="1" source="A" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#94a3b8;" target="U"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E_DU" edge="1" parent="1" source="D" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#94a3b8;" target="U"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
